summary: Tested two fixes: 1) Pipeline value now correctly shows estimated_monthly_revenue from opportunity_estimation (INR value ₹169,200) instead of bottle count from estimated_value. 2) Account Metrics section code verified to show inline account list with expand/collapse instead of dialog popup - shows first 3 accounts with 'Show all X accounts' button when >3 accounts exist.

issues: Dialog component (lines 563-586) is leftover code - no longer triggered by account tiles. Can be removed for cleanup.

critical_code_review_comments: Dialog component in PerformanceTracker.js (lines 563-586) is no longer used - account tiles now use inline list. Consider removing for code cleanup.

success_rate.backend: 75% - 3/4 tests passed (1 failed due to API response format, not functionality)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing H2 2026 Sales Target plan with Rajesh Kumar resource
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline value fix verified: /api/performance/generate returns pipeline.total_value using opportunity_estimation.estimated_monthly_revenue (₹169,200 for Rajesh Kumar's lead 'Taj Sarees'). Account Metrics inline list feature verified in code: shows first 3 accounts, expand button with data-testid='expand-existing-accounts' and 'expand-new-accounts' appears when >3 accounts. Current test data has 0 accounts for all resources, so expand buttons don't appear in UI. Dialog component still exists but is not triggered.

Pipeline_Value_Uses_Estimated_Monthly_Re.details: Pipeline total value shows ₹169,200 (from opportunity_estimation.estimated_monthly_revenue) not ₹1,800 (bottle count from estimated_value)

Pipeline_Summary_Card_Shows_INR.details: Summary card shows PIPELINE ₹1,69,200 with '1 leads' subtitle

Pipeline_Status_Table_Shows_Correct_Valu.details: Pipeline Metrics table shows: Qualified - 1 lead - ₹1,69,200, Total - 1 - ₹1,69,200

Account_Metrics_Inline_List_Code.details: Code shows inline list under tiles (lines 337-362, 370-392) with slice(0,3) for first 3 accounts

Account_Metrics_Expand_Button_Code.details: Expand button with data-testid='expand-existing-accounts' appears when accounts.length > 3 (line 351)

Account_Metrics_Show_Less_Toggle.details: Button text toggles between 'Show less' and 'Show all X accounts' (line 358)

No_Dialog_Popup_For_Account_Tiles.details: Account tiles no longer trigger dialog popup - inline list is used instead

Backend_Get_Pipeline_Value_Helper.details: get_pipeline_value() helper (lines 108-113) uses opportunity_estimation.estimated_monthly_revenue with fallback to expected_value
